commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an install-mode fast path in the managed npm plugin installer plus focused tests so an existing package with version greater than or equal to the requested version skips npm install.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves the requested npm metadata, then rejects an existing managed package directory via `ensureInstallTargetAvailableForMode` before comparing installed and requested versions. I did not run the Docker wizard flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR has blocking correctness and security findings plus an unmet external real-behavior proof gate, so it needs contributor changes and maintainer review rather than a ClawSweeper repair job.

target.title: fix(plugins/install): skip reinstall when installed plugin version satisfies requested
